name: Banana Nut Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and mashed bananas. Mix until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in chopped walnuts, then pour mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 40 minutes.
7. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan, cool before removing the rim.
8. Melt chocolate pieces and margarine with water over low heat, stirring until smooth.
9. Drizzle melted chocolate over cheesecake.
10. Chill.
